title: Volustana
summary: Volustana (Βολούστανα) or  Volustana pass was the main gate between ancient Macedonia and Thessaly. It is not far from Petra (Pieria).
text: Volustana (Βολούστανα) or  Volustana pass was the main gate between ancient Macedonia and Thessaly. It is not far from Petra (Pieria).
